spec.reasoning: Previous attempts failed because blank_row_insert shifted the answer position D3:G3 (risk flag: task_references_specific_cell_addresses). I avoid layout changes entirely. I rename 'Quantity' to 'Qty' and 'ProductSum' to 'SKUTotal' — both are abbreviation-level renames and neither term appears as general English in the instruction. 'Product' is NOT renamed because it appears as a common English word in the instruction ('product's name', 'all products'). A distractor column 'UnitPrice' is added to test whether the agent incorrectly uses it instead of the actual sales/quantity data.
